name: agy-headless-evidence

references.topic: the AGY image + headless primitives this skill consumes

output_contract: A timestamped run directory containing events.jsonl (the headless event stream), last-message.{txt,json} (the final agent message), exit-code (captured $?), and command.txt (argv/cwd/mode/model/scopes) — the validator's proof surface — mirrored as a userFacing brain artifact under ~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/brain/<conversation-id>/. Scope in, evidence out: every headless AGY run leaves a durable, inspectable artifact a downstream context can trust.

sources: skills/agy-headless-evidence/SKILL.md (verified: agy -p/--print, --print-timeout, -c/--continue, --conversation, --add-dir, --dangerously-skip-permissions; agentapi sidecar headless server)
~/.gemini/settings.json BeforeTool->dcg hook on run_shell_command (the floor kept on even under skip-permissions)
LAW 0: claude -p banned for worker dispatch; runtime is agy -p
